general.experimentalHint: Features that are still in development. May be unstable.
general.bottomTerminalHint: Moves the terminal below all panels so it spans the full window width.
general.bigTerminalHint: Run a full terminal in the center panel with ⌘⇧T. Tabs and history are restored on restart.
general.noVirtualizationHint: Renders all messages in a plain scrollable div instead of Virtuoso. May fix scroll jank with expanded tool groups.
general.rollbackHistoryHint: Adds a rewind button to user messages. Clicking it truncates chat history to that point and restores the worktree's files via git snapshot.
general.outputCompressionHint: Reduces token usage by ~80% by compressing Bash output. Downloads a small binary on first enable.
general.replayTourHint: Walk through the main features of Braid again

appearance.streamingAnimationHint: Animate words as they stream in
appearance.chatCompactModeHint: Reduce spacing and font sizes for a denser, CLI-like chat display
appearance.projectAvatarHint: Show project icon next to each project name in the sidebar

ai.extendedContextHint: Enable 1M token context window by default for new sessions
ai.defaultEffortHint: Default reasoning effort for new sessions
ai.thinkingModeHint: Enable extended thinking for new sessions
ai.systemPromptHint: Appended to every session's system prompt
ai.apiKeyHint: Optional — leave blank to use your account
ai.claudeCliPathHint: Absolute path to cli.js inside @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk. Leave blank for auto-detect.
ai.cliNotFound: Claude CLI not found on this system

git.discoveryPatternsHint: Filenames to auto-discover when creating worktrees. Use * as wildcard (e.g. .env*)
git.pullStrategyHint: How to reconcile divergent branches when pulling
git.prPromptHint: Custom prompt sent to Claude when creating a PR with AI. Leave blank for the default.
git.mergeConflictPromptHint: Custom prompt for resolving merge conflicts with AI. Use {{placeholder}} for the target branch. Leave blank for default.

project.workspacesPathHint: Override storage path for this project (blank = global default)
project.defaultBaseBranchHint: Pre-selects in the Add Worktree dialog
project.copyFilesHint: Copied from source worktree when creating new worktrees
project.noCopyFilesHint: Add files like .env that should be copied to new worktrees
project.setupScriptsHint: Runs after a new worktree is created (one command per line)
project.runScriptsHint: On-demand — click play to execute in terminal
project.archiveScriptsHint: Runs before a worktree is deleted (one command per line)
project.runScriptsSettingsHint: Manage pinned favorites and custom commands for the Run tab
project.noPinnedFavorites: No pinned favorites — star scripts in the Run tab to pin them here

gitIdentity.title: Git Identity
gitIdentity.overrideToggle: Override git identity for this project
gitIdentity.overrideHint: Set a different name and email for commits in this repository
gitIdentity.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or fewer
gitIdentity.clearError: Failed to clear git identity override

project.lspHint: Automatic code intelligence: hover, go-to-definition, diagnostics

claudePermissions.title: Permission Rules
claudePermissions.hint: Control which tools and patterns Claude is allowed or denied
claudePermissions.selectProject: Select a project to view its permissions
claudePermissions.bypassPermissionsHint: When enabled, tools run without confirmation (deny-list still applies). Disable to review each tool use before execution.

claudeHooks.title: Hook Events
claudeHooks.hint: Commands that run automatically at specific lifecycle events

claudeInstructions.title: Instructions
claudeInstructions.hint: Custom instructions that Claude reads at the start of every session
claudeInstructions.empty: No instructions configured. Start typing to create the file.
claudeInstructions.selectProject: Select a project to edit its instructions

claudeMcp.title: MCP Servers
claudeMcp.hint: Configure Model Context Protocol servers available to Claude
claudeMcp.emptyHint: Add a server to extend Claude with external tools and data sources
claudeMcp.authHint: For authenticated servers, add an Authorization header (e.g. Bearer token) or required API key headers.

apps.enableHint: Add app shortcuts above your project list
apps.invalidUrl: URL must start with http:// or https://

github.description: Connect to GitHub via the GitHub CLI (gh). Powers PR status, CI checks, deployments, and merge actions.
github.installHint: Installs via Homebrew (brew install gh). Homebrew must be installed first.
github.signInHint: Authenticate using GitHub's Device Flow. Opens your browser to authorize Braid.

jira.description: Connect to Jira via the Atlassian CLI (acli). Shows linked issues from branch names and enables ticket lookup when creating worktrees.
jira.baseUrlHint: Your Atlassian site URL (e.g. https://yourcompany.atlassian.net). Auto-detected from jira-cli config if left blank.

analytics.noData: No sessions yet — start chatting to see analytics
analytics.tokenNote: Tokens shown for sessions started in this period

about.tagline: The next generation of how software gets built
about.mission: We believe AI doesn't just speed up coding - it fundamentally changes how software is made. Braid is built around that conviction: a workspace where humans and AI agents collaborate in parallel, each owning their own Git worktree, moving independently, shipping faster. This is not a chat interface bolted onto your editor. It is a new primitive, the developer environment reimagined for the age of AI.
about.cap1: Parallel Claude sessions, each scoped to a dedicated Git worktree
about.cap2: Mission Control - a kanban board for cross-worktree oversight
about.cap3: Real-time diffs, PR checks, and a full terminal per worktree
about.cap4: Session history, model switching, file mentions, image attachments
about.contributorsThanks: Thanks to all the people who have contributed to Braid.

experimental.hint: Features in development. May be unstable or change without notice.
experimental.magicTrackpadHint: Two-finger horizontal swipe on the trackpad to switch between tabs. Swipe left for the next tab, swipe right for the previous tab.

claudeSkills.title: Skills
claudeSkills.hint: Custom skills become slash commands in Claude sessions
claudeSkills.selectProject: Select a project to view its skills
claudeSkills.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{name}}"? This removes the entire skill directory.
